# GitHub Assets

This folder contains README and repository presentation assets.

## Files

- `verwaltung-app-hero.svg`: hero banner used at the top of the main `README.md`
- `preview-news.png`: captured preview of the public news screen
- `preview-login.png`: captured preview of the login screen
- `social-preview.html`: source layout used to generate the social preview image
- `social-preview.png`: recommended GitHub repository social preview image

## GitHub Social Preview

GitHub repository social preview is not configured from git-tracked files. Upload it manually in the repository settings:

1. Open the repository on GitHub.
2. Go to `Settings`.
3. Open `General`.
4. Scroll to `Social preview`.
5. Upload `.github/assets/social-preview.png`.

Use the generated `social-preview.png` in this folder as the canonical preview image.
